label: Thing def style
description: A pairing of a ThingDef with a ThingStyleDef used as list items in StyleCategoryDef.thingDefStyles. Both fields are private in source but present in all shipped XML.

thingDef.label: Thing def
thingDef.description: The base ThingDef whose appearance this entry overrides. Private in source but present in shipped XML.

styleDef.label: Style def
styleDef.description: The ThingStyleDef supplying the visual override. Private in source but present in shipped XML.
